.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(14, 12, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-control-item.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-path-label.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(14, 12, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.graph-controls.background: rgb(14, 12, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(204, 170, 0, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-input-container.global-search-in.background: rgb(16, 13, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-result-file-matched-text.background: rgba(216, 200, 24, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(14, 12, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf.mod-active.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-tab-header-container.background: rgb(14, 12, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(51, 178, 106, 0.03) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body::after.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #110e0c 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#110e0c, color-mix(in srgb, #110e0c 65%, transparent))
body::after.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::after.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::after.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #110e0c 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#110e0c, color-mix(in srgb, #110e0c 65%, transparent))
body::after.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
body::after.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13);'/></svg>")
body::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 2px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 2px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgba(204, 170, 0, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(51, 178, 106) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(5, 1, 1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(16, 13, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(16, 13, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(12, 10, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(12, 10, 8) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(6, 5, 4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgba(155, 10, 6, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead th.background: rgba(155, 10, 6, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(170, 17, 0, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
